heroTitle.other: Understand your family balance sheet at a glance.

heroDesc.other: A visual asset management tool that also supports family asset management. Assets, liabilities, structure, goals, and trends are visible on one screen.

heroCard2Desc.other: Manage household, personal and goal books.

trustTitle.other: Trusted by leading banks and finance platforms

trustDesc.other: Partnering with well-known banks and securities platforms to build affordable software that is easy to understand and use.

featuresDesc.other: Not generic bookkeeping. It is built for structure, risk and long-term goals.

f1d.other: See total assets, net assets and liabilities in one page.

f2d.other: Structure and currency cards help spot allocation bias.

f3d.other: Track net-worth rhythm and detect risks earlier.

f4d.other: Default and multiple books can run together.

f5d.other: Member management and sharing for multi-person workflows.

detailsDesc.other: Aggregate scattered data into one coherent view.

d1d.other: Support cash, investments, fixed, receivable, payable, and loans.

d2d.other: Auto-calculate remaining amount to keep goals actionable.

d3d.other: Optional base currency for multi-currency assets.

d4d.other: Family members can co-maintain one data set.

d5d.other: Customize card order and visibility on home screen.

d6d.other: Data is local by default with optional iCloud sync.

downloadDesc.other: Install iAssets and build your family asset system.

reviewsTitle.other: People build better financial habits with iAssets.

reviewsDesc.other: From recording one item to understanding full trends.

r1.other: Finally we can see all household assets in one place.

r2.other: Monthly review dropped from one hour to ten minutes.

r3.other: Trend cards are intuitive and family-friendly.

r4.other: Multi-book mode is perfect for couple collaboration.

r5.other: Goal card makes long-term planning executable.

r6.other: Light UI, easy to open every day.

r7.other: Weekly reviews got much easier after auto net-worth summaries.

r8.other: Allocation categories are clear, I finally know where money sits.

r9.other: Shared books work great, the whole family can update without chaos.

r10.other: Visual goal progress noticeably improved my saving consistency.

r11.other: Offline logging is reliable, I can update during commute.

r12.other: Switching between books is smooth, work and home are clearly separated.

pricingDesc.other: Yearly payment is recommended to support sustainable development, and lifetime purchase is also available.

p2d.other: Pay yearly to support the healthy growth of the software.

faqDesc.other: If you have questions, start here.

a1.other: Same as iAssets app: zh-Hans, zh-Hant-TW, zh-Hant-HK, zh-Hant-MO, zh-Hant-SG, English, Japanese, Korean.

a2.other: Yes. You can create and edit offline, then sync when online.

a3.other: Local-first by default, with optional iCloud sync.

a4.other: Yes. Family mode supports members and shared books.

a6.other: Download the app and create your first book.

privacyIntro.other: Welcome to iAssets. We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how iAssets handles data.

privacyS1P.other: iAssets follows a local-first data model. Asset, liability, account, and category data you enter is stored on your device by default.

privacyS1L1.other: By default, data is not uploaded to our servers.

privacyS1L2.other: By default, we do not build identity-linked remote profiles.

privacyS2P.other: If you enable iCloud sync, your data is synced across devices via Apple iCloud, subject to Apple's terms and privacy policy.

privacyS3P.other: We may rely on required third-party infrastructure (such as Apple platform capabilities) for core functions. We do not sell your personal data.

privacyS4P.other: We recommend enabling device passcode, biometric unlock, and system security settings. iAssets supports passcode protection and auto-lock.

privacyS5P.other: Except where required by law or necessary for safety, we do not proactively disclose your local data content to third parties.

privacyS6P.other: We may update this policy from time to time. Updated versions take effect when published. Material changes will be announced in app or on site.

privacyS7P.other: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at: idebuginn@gmail.com

termsIntro.other: Welcome to iAssets. Please read these terms carefully before using the app and related services. By using iAssets, you agree to these terms.

termsS1P.other: iAssets provides household asset management features, including asset records, liability management, analytics, goal tracking, and multi-book collaboration.

termsS2P.other: You are responsible for the authenticity and legality of data you enter. Please keep your device and account credentials secure.

termsS3L1.other: Do not use iAssets for illegal activities.

termsS3L2.other: Do not interfere with or attack normal app operation.

termsS3L3.other: Do not copy, reverse-engineer, or distribute protected content without authorization.

termsS4P.other: iAssets may offer yearly subscription and lifetime purchase options. Actual pricing and features are subject to in-app display.

termsS5P.other: iAssets and related design, code, trademarks, and content are protected by intellectual property laws.

termsS6P.other: iAssets is an information management tool and does not constitute investment, tax, legal, or financial advice.

termsS7P.other: We may update these terms as needed. Continued use after updates means acceptance. If you disagree, stop using the service.

termsS8P.other: If you have questions about these terms, contact: idebuginn@gmail.com
